entry.title: You just need a little sweetness for those sad, sad eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Ocyus_Stuff

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,422Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: “No, why—”. Batman’s mouth clamped shut, face looking rather constipated. It was truly a sight, seeing the Big Bat himself rigidly shuffling in place with pursed lips and the air of a man who is regretting his entire existence. “Why…did you make me cookies?”. Now, Barry’s a rambler. It came with being a speedster, with a mind that ran and ran and never stopped. There’s countless ways he could answer this and countless amounts of reasons why that particular answer would work – would be the right one but out of all those, Barry's mouth moved, his heart having already chosen one from the start. “As a thank you”.Or the Flash found out Batman liked cookies and just rolled with it.

entry.title: Nothing Break Like A Heart..
entry.summary:
Author: just_bubbles_4ever

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,993Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Clark is a busy man. Clark is a man with many secrets, but you would never guess that by his sweet, golden retriever personality. A man who has lately slacked on his job. His writing is falling flat and the more he writes poorly, the more he is at risk of losing his job. Then he is given a golden opportunity, a chance to turn the tide. He is going undercover and must write the most jaw dropping, world altering, mind blowing paper for the Daily Planet. The Problem is when he slowly develops feeling for the person he must write about, Bruce Wayne. Can he truly write this paper knowing it would kill Bruce? Will he lose his job for Bruce? Will any of this even matter if the Justice League can’t stop Lex, who is dabbling in something too powerful for Earth. When line cross and truths are revealed, the two man can either change for each other, or burn the bridge they spent so long building together.

entry.title: i've always put my cards upon the table/never be said that i'd be unstable
entry.summary:
Author: kay_n

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,673Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 18

Summary: While Gotham was characteristically rainy and dark, she had her days. That it was sparse and uncommon was granted; but every once in a while the sun would come out just a little more and the moon would shine just a touch brighter. It was on one of those days-- well, nights-- that Bruce ran into the infamous alien. He had worked with him before on occasional league missions, but never bothered to do more than grunt or give a cursory response when he addressed him. Something about the way he presented himself struck Bruce the wrong way.[...]Bruce may be called the world's greatest detective, but he was actually quite useless when it came to reading people’s intentions when he was involved. He had spent a lot of his childhood among petty friends who took him for granted and wanted nothing more than his money, and that seemed to follow him into adulthood. Or; Bruce can't seem to get a read on this Superman guy-- but that doesn't stop him from wanting to pick him apart to understand what makes him tick. Or take his clothes off. Please enjoy! Feel free to leave a comment or kudos:)Title is from "Just My Imagination" by The Cranberries.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,765Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 99

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: Speedsters Tuck for the Love of the Game
entry.summary:
Author: demoninthehouse

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,331Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: Haven't you ever wondered if any male superheroes tuck? A conversation between Wally West, Aquaman, and Superman when they get sent out on a team bonding activity. Wally brings up the topic of tucking, and they have a frank conversation about keeping their dick out of the way/in place in their supersuits. Wonder Woman and Nightwing show up towards the end. Wally talks about his polyamory, and Wonder Woman spills tea about Superbat.

entry.title: A Shadow Of A Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,963Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 1,682

Summary: Danyal Al Ghul was the younger twin brother of Damian Al Ghul, and destined to be his brother’s right hand man, the ghost that whispered the secrets of others in his ear. Danyal was a dangerous foe to have, one that could look at you and know all of your secrets, one that could vanish right in front of you. So, it was both the saddest and the happiest day when Danyal Al Ghul and his guards disappeared, all thought to be dead, when he was ten.Danny Fenton was the quiet weird kid that the strange, eccentric Drs. Maddie and Jack Fenton found and adopted one day. He was deathly silent, and yet with one look from his piercing blue eyes he could silence you. Even with his weird aura around him, he managed to pull two of the only other weird kids into being his best friends. The three of them were inseparable and seemed to have developed their own silent communications.Danny is weirdly smart about certain things and yet seems to be failing his English class. Danny is forced to write an essay that just so happens to win his English class a week-long trip to Gotham. Surely nothing could go wrong with a group of teenagers from Amity Park and the two adults accompanying them in Gotham?

entry.title: L’appel Du Vide
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,855Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: L'appel Due Vide Human instincts can't always be trusted.We can be on the highest of grounds, our steps measured, our breath cutting short in fear. And as you look down, you can either embrace fear like a safe blanket, forbidding you to do anything illogical. Or you could succumb to the endless urge of letting go, accepting the dark pit below like one final hug —cold and painful— from death's welcoming arms.   The Justice League: The Greatest Heroes of the World, bring hope in salvation and faith of another waking day to the common civilians. But where does it come from? That...motivation to keep going? That small voice in their head which...they aren't able to recognize, yet sounds oh-so-familiar? Were they Dreams?Fantasies?Hallucinations? Or something as terrifying as memories?   — Also known as a story about a different timeline where our heroes' legacies and sidekicks were taken in by the wrong people at the perfect time.

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,439Chapters: 31/33Kudos: 13

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn't advertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

entry.title: You can take the boy from the circus
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,489Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 519

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul Wayne had everything at one point. He was a prince. Ibn al Xu'ffasch. Son of the bat. Heir to the demon. He had never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his palace in Nanda Parbat. He had never asked to be shipped to a gloomy, grey city. Even when his father kept taking in orphans and ruining his plans for inheritance, Damian stood steadfast. But then his father died, leaving behind his newest orphan. A tiny acrobat with watery blue eyes and black curls, who spoke no English. Damian knew the boy never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his circus troupe. Damian knew he needed to be there for him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Homecoming
entry.summary:
Author: Jayden_Jones (KoaKillianAZ)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,153Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Richard Grayson doesn't hate his parents, he really doesn't. He loves them, he loves his father Clark and his mom Bruce, and he loves his siblings. But he needs time, time to think, time to define who he is. They had a fight, a very bad one, the worst they ever had, mama and papa really don't like the idea of him being a superhero, so he ran, he ran away from home. Robin is not dumb, he knows that his parents know where he is, apparently they are giving him time Now he is here, with this team, a team full of young superheroes, people who he loves, but who have no idea who he truly is. That doesn't matter anymore, because his little brother Jason just showed up in the Titans tower. Mama and Papa just went missing, and that means Robin has to go home ---- Or: What if the robin from the 2003 titans show was a superbat baby

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Who He Needs
entry.summary:
Author: the_snoodle

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,102Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: When Clark enters the Watchtower in a straight panic, Bruce knows something is very wrong. Unbeknownst to him, there is one thing Clark needs, something only Bruce can give.

entry.title: The cold boy that met the sun
entry.summary:
Author: Arachnophobic_SpiderMan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,727Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 133

Summary: What happens when Alfred Pennyworth finds 15 years old Bruce Wayne's suicide plans ? What happens when Bruce Wayne runs away ? What happens when he finds himself in Smallville, Kansas, on the anniversary of his parent's murder ? He meets Clark Kent, that's what happens.orI need more of fics where Bruce and Clark meet as teenagers. Honestly i wrote this for myself. Tags may be added as the story goes fyi. Also english is very much not my first language and it shows, so no hate pls okayy? thanksss xx
